uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

filename.description: Original filename of the uploaded CSV.

recordCount.description: Number of records in the dataset.

storagePath.description: Path to the raw CSV file in Cloud Storage.

kpis.description: Key Performance Indicators derived from the dataset.

forecastResult.title: Forecast Result
forecastResult.description: A single data point in a time-series forecast.

date.description: The date of the forecast point.

confidenceIntervalLower.description: The lower bound of the confidence interval.

confidenceIntervalUpper.description: The upper bound of the confidence interval.

associationRule.title: Association Rule
associationRule.description: A single market basket analysis association rule.

antecedents.description: The 'if' part of the rule (products bought together).

consequents.description: The 'then' part of the rule (products also bought).

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information for each user, keyed by their auth UID.

/datasets/{datasetId}.description: Top-level collection for all datasets, linking to the user who owns it.

/datasets/{datasetId}/forecasts.description: Subcollection to store time-series forecast results for a specific dataset.

/datasets/{datasetId}/associationRules.description: Subcollection to store market basket analysis rules for a specific dataset.
